items.question: What is Mark Systems?
items.answer: A digital services company based in Longueuil. We build websites, AI agents, automation workflows and quality scoring tools. Our main products are NEXOS, GENCORE and SOIC.

items.question: Is Mark Systems related to ECI Mark Systems?
items.answer: No. ECI Mark Systems is a US-based ERP solutions provider. Mark Systems is an independent Quebec company. No commercial or corporate affiliation.

items.question: How does the NEXOS pipeline work?
items.answer: NEXOS coordinates 56 specialized AI agents across 6 phases (discovery, strategy, design, content, build, QA). Each transition goes through a SOIC quality gate. The result: a complete Next.js site, Law 25 compliant, with a verified quality score.

items.question: What type of clients do you work with?
items.answer: Mostly Quebec SMBs and startups that need a solid website, automation or an AI agent. We also take on technical mandates for larger companies.

items.question: What's the timeline for a website?
items.answer: A showcase site (10-15 pages, bilingual FR/EN, Law 25 compliant) is delivered in 2 to 4 weeks. More complex projects (SaaS, dashboards, multiple integrations) take 4 to 8 weeks.

items.question: Are the websites compliant with Law 25?
items.answer: Yes. Every site includes an opt-in consent banner, a privacy policy, legal notices and an incident process. Compliance is automatically verified by SOIC's D8 quality gate before deployment.

items.question: Is the source code accessible?
items.answer: Yes. Client sites are delivered with complete source code (Next.js, TypeScript). Several of our products are open-source on GitHub (NEXOS, GENCORE, OSIRIS Scanner).

items.question: How do I start a project?
items.answer: Fill out the interactive brief (7 steps, 5 minutes) or send an email to marc@marksystems.ca. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Describe your needs in a few steps. We'll analyze and come back with a concrete proposal.

hero.label: Our products
hero.title: Tools built in-house
hero.description: 7 products designed, built and maintained by Mark Systems.

nexos.name: NEXOS
nexos.tagline: 56 AI agents, 6 phases, built-in quality gates.
nexos.description: AI-assisted website creation pipeline. Coordinates 56 specialized agents across 6 sequential phases with SOIC quality gates.

gencore.name: GENCORE
gencore.description: Enterprise AI agent platform. Docker sandbox, 14 LLM providers, policy governance, immutable audit trail.

soic.name: SOIC v3
soic.description: Web quality scoring engine (0-10). Evaluates Architecture, Documentation, Tests, Security, Performance, Accessibility, SEO, Law 25 Compliance, Code Quality.
soic.proof: Integrated in NEXOS, GENCORE and Mark Systems tools

osiris.name: OSIRIS Scanner
osiris.description: Composite score (0-10) measuring the operational health of a website: performance, security, intrusion, resources.
osiris.proof: Used in production on all NEXOS clients

oneclick.name: One-Click Report AI
oneclick.tagline: Raw data to visual PDF report in one click.
oneclick.description: Transforms Excel, PDF, images (OCR) into visual PDF reports with AI summaries. 4 languages supported.
oneclick.proof: In production — client reports generated automatically

finance.name: Financial Intelligence Suite
finance.tagline: Financial dashboard with hybrid AI scoring.
finance.description: Financial intelligence dashboard with KPIs, scoring, interactive charts and portfolio analysis.

archviewer.name: NEXOS Architecture Viewer
archviewer.tagline: Interactive viewer of the 56 agents and 6 NEXOS phases.
archviewer.description: Master-detail navigation tool for the NEXOS architecture. Explore agents, phases and SOIC dimensions.
archviewer.proof: Living documentation of the NEXOS pipeline

nexosPipeline.title: NEXOS Pipeline — from request to delivered site
nexosPipeline.challenge: Generate professional-quality websites systematically and reproducibly.
nexosPipeline.solution: Pipeline coordinated by 56 specialized AI agents, with SOIC quality gates between each phase. Automatic fixes for security and Law 25 compliance.
nexosPipeline.result: 7 production sites. Average score 9.33/10. Delivery time reduced by 60%.

gencorePlatform.title: GENCORE — AI agents with governance
gencorePlatform.challenge: Deploy AI agents in enterprises with security, audit trail and access control.
gencorePlatform.solution: Multi-LLM architecture with rootless Docker sandbox, RBAC, governance policies and immutable audit trail.
gencorePlatform.result: 918 tests, 14 LLM providers, 9 skills. Local data, no vendor lock-in.

n8nEcosystem.title: n8n Ecosystem — 195+ workflows in production
n8nEcosystem.challenge: Automate recurring acquisition, onboarding and reporting processes.
n8nEcosystem.solution: Library of 195+ n8n workflows: scraping, scoring, outreach, CRM, PDF reports and multiple integrations.
n8nEcosystem.result: Automated acquisition, 24h onboarding, PDF reports without manual intervention.

osirisScanner.title: OSIRIS Scanner — web health scoring
osirisScanner.challenge: Objectively measure a website's health across multiple axes.
osirisScanner.solution: Composite score (0-10) combining performance (Lighthouse), security (headers + CVE), intrusion (ports) and resources (sobriety).
osirisScanner.result: Used in production on all NEXOS clients. Fast + deep mode with history.

hero.label: Our tools
hero.title: Our tools
hero.description: 8 tools built in-house — calculators, AI, scanners and automated reports.

estimaweb.name: EstimaWeb QC
estimaweb.description: Estimate your web project cost in 5 minutes. Interactive questionnaire tailored to the Quebec market.

impots.name: Impôts 2025
impots.description: Tax calculator for Quebec and all 13 Canadian provinces. Federal + provincial, credits and deductions.

saaq.name: SAAQ Prep B++
saaq.description: Class 5 driving license theoretical exam prep. 250+ questions with detailed explanations. Simulated exam mode, progressive difficulty levels.

oneclick.name: One-Click Report AI
oneclick.description: Transform raw data (Excel, PDF, images) into visual PDF reports with AI summaries. 4 languages supported (FR, EN, ES, DE). One-click generation.

finance.name: Financial Intelligence Suite
finance.description: Executive financial dashboard with hybrid AI + quantitative scoring. Interactive KPIs, portfolio analysis, security indicators. SOIC score 9.62/10.

summeet.name: SumMeet
summeet.description: AI-powered meeting summaries. 3 modes: audio recording, text paste, or file upload. Whisper transcription + structured summary via Claude or Ollama.

inbox-zero.name: Inbox Zero
inbox-zero.description: AI-powered email triage. 5 categories (urgent, action, info, delegate, delete). Rules + AI fallback. Supports Gmail, IMAP, and Microsoft.

osiris.name: OSIRIS Scanner
osiris.description: Composite web health score (0-10) across 4 axes: Performance, Security, Intrusion, and Resources. 156 automated tests. JSON + Markdown reports.

founder.label: Founder
founder.name: Marc-André
founder.title: Electrical Engineer · Founder of Mark Systems
founder.bio: 10+ years in industrial electrical engineering — PLC/CNC, production lines, protection systems, defense. Same approach applied to digital: measure, document, deliver.
founder.background: From industrial wiring to AI-generated websites — the common thread is engineering rigor.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Digital tools that work.
mission.description: Building concrete digital assets for Quebec SMBs: websites that generate leads, AI systems that reduce workload, scoring tools that verify quality.

rigor.title: Measurable rigor

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Public scores, open-source code, accessible reports. The work speaks for itself.

results.title: Results first
results.description: 7 production sites, 918 tests, 195+ workflows. The numbers are what matter.

compliance.title: Built-in compliance
compliance.description: Law 25 is in the pipeline from the start, not bolted on at the end.

brief.title: Describe your project
brief.subtitle: Fill out this form in 5 minutes. We automatically generate a complete brief in PDF — ready to start.

stepDescriptions.company: Your company details. This info will appear on your website and in legal documents.
stepDescriptions.site: What type of site? Which pages? What features? We adapt to your needs.
stepDescriptions.adaptive: Specific options based on your chosen site type — payments, blog, portfolio, authentication, etc.
stepDescriptions.legal: Quebec's Law 25 requires a privacy policy and a data protection officer. We handle it.
stepDescriptions.design: Your visual preferences: colors, typography, style. Do you already have a logo?
stepDescriptions.seo: Your competitors, target keywords, and any useful info to position your site.
stepDescriptions.review: Review your answers before generating the brief. You can edit each section.
